title: Project
description: Per-project configuration for Cloverleaf. Defines the project key, name, and the ID pattern Work Items in the project must follow.

key.description: Short identifier used as ID prefix and reference target. Uppercase alphanumeric only.

id_pattern.description: Regex Work Item ids must match. Default (applied by consumers when absent): '^{project_key}-\\d+$' with {project_key} substituted.
